case_title: N.N. PATEL vs. DURCY, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, MONICA DURLEY, CHARLES E.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DURLEY, CHARLES E. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DURLEY, CHARLES E.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, MONICA DURLEY, CHARLES E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 TURK STREET #31A $814.05 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $814.05, LEASE FORFEITED, PER DIEM HOLDOVER OF $22.85 AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. COSTS ARE AWARDED PER COST BILL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF N.N. PATEL SERVED FEB-24-1999, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, MONICA
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAR-29-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.85 FILED BY PLAINTIFF N.N. PATEL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $89.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF N.N. PATEL AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, MONICA

ROOM 220, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, CSAUCEDA, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK 10:18 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT CHARLES DURCY NOT PRESENT, BUT HIS BROTHER IS PRESENT, WHO ORALLY REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL ON THE GROUND THAT DEFT IS AT THE SF GENERAL HOSPITAL. PLTF OPPOSED MOTION AND ON COURTS ORDER, VERIFIED DEFT'S HOSPITALIZATION, WHICH WAS CONFIRMED, BUT COULD NOT ASCERTAIN WHEN DEFT WILL BE RELEASED. IN VIEW OF THIS, MOTION IS GRANTED, TRIAL CONTINUED TO 3/29/99 AT 9:00 AM, ROOM 206. ANY REQUESTS FOR CONT. HAS TO GO BEFORE THE PRESIDING JUDGE. COURT SENT NOTICE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF N.N. PATEL AS TO DEFENDANT DURCY, CHARLES HALL, MONICA DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
